title: The Warriorr
desc: A man is banished to abandon the city when he rebels against a notorious gangster. However, he returns as DSP of police with a steadfast goal to settle a score.

title: Aathi
desc: A young boy moves to Chennai for his education where he meets a girl and falls in love with her. Soon, they learn that they are both on a mission to avenge the death of their parents.

title: Vettai Puli
desc: A newly appointed officer is tasked with eliminating an extortion gang in the city. Unbeknownst to him, the gang's leader is someone close to him.

title: Pokkiri
desc: Thamizh, an undercover officer posing as a hitman, falls for Shruthi, who disapproves of his violent lifestyle. Their growing bond faces risks from his hidden mission.

title: Puli
desc: Marudheeran goes on a quest to bring back his love, Pavazhamalli, who was kidnapped by the Vedhalams, a group that possesses mystical powers. He must face Yavanarani, a sorceress, and her aide.
